ios._docs_appleId: Your Apple ID email used for App Store Connect
ios._docs_ascAppId: Found in App Store Connect > App > General > App Information (numeric ID e.g. 6741234567)
ios._docs_appleTeamId: Found in https://developer.apple.com/account > Membership (10-char alphanumeric e.g. ABCD1234EF). Set these AFTER creating the app in App Store Connect.

android._docs_setup: 1) Create Google Cloud service account with Service Account User role. 2) In Google Play Console > Setup > API access, link the service account. 3) Grant Release manager permission. 4) Download JSON key as apps/mobile/google-service-account.json. 5) google-service-account.json is in .gitignore. Track options: internal -> alpha -> beta -> production.
